midfielddata 0.2.4
    • Data structure
    • Data linked by student ID
  • Reference
  • News

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

version 0.2.4

  • Update articles
  • Reorder columns to put composite keys leftmost

version 0.2.3

2026-05

  • Noted the transfer of the research database to ASEE
  • Add new, non-vignette articles
  • Update README

version 0.2.2

2024-12

  • Revise race/ethnicity from Latinx to Hispanic

version 0.2.1

2024-05

  • Update the midfielddata-package.R file
  • Add roxygen.R to generate repeated text for common arguments.

version 0.2.0

2022-12

  • New sample data, all four data sets
  • Update package tests to match

version 0.1.5

2022-10

  • Revise race/ethnicity from Latinx to Latine
  • Ensure values of “” are replaced with NA_character_

version 0.1.4

2022-07

  • Match variable names in practice data to those in MIDFIELD research data

version 0.1.3

2021-07

  • Removed problematic data after 2003 for Institution M
  • Added data tests to check for range and possible values

version 0.1.2

2021-06

  • changed names of data tables and variables to be consistent with research data
  • remove Travis CI

version 0.1.1

2020-07

  • reformatted data frames as data.tables
  • remove dependencies on dplyr and related packages

version 0.1.0

2018-06, made public on GitHub

On this page

Developed by Richard Layton, Russell Long, Matthew Ohland, Marisa Orr, Susan Lord, US National Science Foundation.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
